caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a light-colored button-down shirt and a dark blazer, is seated in an interview setting. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring logos for "theCUBE", "taSV 2015", and the hashtag "#BigDataSV". A white laptop and a water bottle are visible on the table in front of him. A blue and orange graphic overlay appears across the middle of the scene, displaying the text "RISHI YADAV I @meditativesoul", "CEO", and "infoobjects". To the left of this text is a small logo for "INFO-OBJECTS". As the sequence progresses, the man transitions from a serious expression with a slight frown and closed lips to a wide smile, revealing his teeth. He remains seated and facing forward throughout the sequence, with the background and on-screen graphics remaining static while only his facial expression changes.
